error_signature: new versions of n8n google sheet credentials now ask for additional fields
title: Google Sheets credentials require additional OAuth2 fields
symptom: Users encounter confusion when setting up Google Sheets credentials due to new required fields. The setup now includes Authorization URL and Access Token URL, which were not previously needed.
applies_when: On a newer version of n8n
not_this_if: Using an older version of n8n
root_cause: Recent updates to n8n's Google Sheets integration have introduced additional OAuth2 configuration requirements. Users must now provide an Authorization URL and Access Token URL, which were not part of the previous setup process.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheets credentials configuration in n8n.
Set the Grant Type to 'Authorization Code'.
Use the OAuth Redirect URL provided by n8n.
agent_instruction: Update the Google Sheets credentials with the new OAuth2 configuration details.
